title: MikroTik GPERx6 CSS606-1G-2Gi-3S+OUT
description: The MikroTik GPERx6 CSS606-1G-2Gi-3S+OUT is a robust outdoor switch designed to withstand harsh weather conditions. It offers an IP66 protection rating and an operating temperature range from - 40 °C to + 70 °C . The unit can be easily mounted on a pole or mast using a hose clamp The unit is powered via a terminal screw with an input voltage of 12â57 V or through PoE-IN (802.3bt) 42â57 V via Eth_Port1 . Power for other connected devices, such as switches or access points, is provided by (2) Ethernet ports using passive PoE Out up to 57 V with a data speed of 1 Gbps If it is necessary to connect devices that require higher data transfer speeds or are located farther from the unit, you can use (3) 10 Gbps SFP+ ports . Connection of specialized IoT devices , such as thermostats or sensors, is possible via (3) DC Out outputs Thanks to the screw terminal and SFP+ ports , it is possible to use a hybrid optical cable that combines optical fibers for data transmission and copper wires for power delivery within a single sheath. The main advantage is that only one cable is needed to connect the device Ethernet port: Eth_Port1 = PoE-in Ethernet ports: Eth_Port2 a Eth_Port3 = passive PoE-out to 57 V (802.3 at) Optical modules: (3) SFP+ (10 Gbps) Protection class: IP66 Unit power supply: screw terminal 12 â 57 V or PoE-in 42 â 57 V (802.3bt) Device Fastening set (2) Hose clamp
